itemListElement.reviewBody:
Very bad experience with this school administration. I had done admission of my daughter in this school for 24-25.But after one month my daughter didn’t want to continue study there that’s why I request them refund my balance money after deduct their genuine fees but they did not respond and told me that you have to pay extra money and they didn’t release my daughter’s luggage also. I have paid Rs. 5 lac to them and they deny to refund not a single amount.

I have filed case against this school. I am fighting on behalf of all our parents who have cheated by this fraud school.
Freinds be care ful of them. Thanks

itemReviewed.name: ecole globale international girls school - Adhoiwala

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a proud alumna of Ecole Globale, a premier girls' boarding school nestled in the picturesque city of Dehradun, I feel compelled to share my transformative journey that went far beyond academics.
This institution is not just a school; it's a nurturing ground for young minds, where excellence is not just pursued but lived.

From the moment I stepped into the lush, of Ecole Globale, I knew I was about to embark on a journey unlike any other.
The school's facilities are state-of-the-art, designed to cater not just to our educational needs but to foster holistic development.

Classrooms equipped with the latest technology, well-stocked libraries, advanced science labs, and creative arts studios became our arenas of exploration and discovery.

The sports complex, with its wide range of facilities, ensured that we were physically active and mentally agile.

However, what truly sets Ecole Globale apart is its faculty. The teachers here are not just educators; they are mentors, guides, and sometimes, friends. Their dedication to our growth was evident in every lesson they taught and every conversation we had. They pushed us to question, to explore, and to exceed our own expectations. Under their guidance, I found my voice, my passion, and a sense of purpose.

The curriculum at Ecole Globale is thoughtfully designed to prepare us for the world beyond school. It's rigorous yet flexible, allowing us to pursue our interests and talents.

The school's emphasis on experiential learning meant that our education was not confined to textbooks. We were encouraged to undertake projects, participate in international exchange programs, and engage in community service, which broadened our horizons and instilled in us a sense of global citizenship.

But perhaps, the most significant impact Ecole Globale had on me was on my personal development. The school's ethos, centered around empowerment and respect, created an environment where we were encouraged to be our best selves. The values of integrity, empathy, and resilience were woven into every aspect of school life, shaping us into confident and compassionate individuals.

Living away from home, in a diverse community of students, I learned invaluable lessons in independence, teamwork, and leadership. The friendships I formed here are among my most cherished treasures, built on shared experiences and mutual respect.

My time at Ecole Globale was a journey of self-discovery, learning, and growth. It was here that I was not just educated but transformed. The school's unparalleled facilities, dedicated faculty, and empowering environment have left an indelible mark on my personality, for which I am eternally grateful. To anyone considering Ecole Globale for their education, I can say with confidence that it is a place where dreams are nurtured, and futures are built.

itemReviewed.name: ecole globale international girls school - Adhoiwala

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Ecole Globale in Dehradun is a remarkable haven for academic and personal growth, especially from a brother's perspective. The school's serene campus nestled in the Himalayan foothills provides a conducive environment for holistic development. The state-of-the-art facilities, coupled with a strong academic curriculum, ensure a well-rounded education.
As a brother, witnessing the transformation of my sibling at Ecole Globale has been truly inspiring. The school fosters a sense of camaraderie, emphasizing values that extend beyond the classroom. The dedicated faculty not only imparts knowledge but also instills essential life skills. Boarding life is characterized by a supportive community, encouraging students to forge lasting bonds.
Ecole Globale stands out as a premier boarding school, not just for its academic excellence but also for nurturing individuals who emerge as confident, responsible, and compassionate global citizens. It's a place where education transcends textbooks, making it an invaluable choice for those seeking a comprehensive and enriching educational experience.

itemListElement.reviewBody: Seeing my niece thrive at Ecole Global fills me with immense pride and gratitude. The school's commitment to excellence in education, combined with its nurturing environment, has truly transformed her into a confident and capable young woman. The faculty and staff at Ecole Global are not just educators but mentors who genuinely care about the well-being and success of each student. From academic achievements to personal growth, I've witnessed firsthand the positive impact the school has had on my niece. The opportunities for leadership, creativity, and community engagement have helped her develop invaluable skills and character traits that will serve her well in the future. Sending her to Ecole Global was one of the best decisions our family made, and I am excited to see her continue to flourish in such a supportive and inspiring environment.

itemReviewed.name: ecole globale international girls school - Adhoiwala

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst boarding school ever‼️
It’s only beautiful and attractive on the outside but the opposite inside‼️
It should have been named - “Gold Digger Int. Girls School” 😂
There are lots of other boarding schools which is less expensive but better than this school‼️
I myself was a student of Ecole so I’m writing what I’ve experienced so that you don’t make the same mistake by coming here‼️
➡️They will loot lots of money from you but you won’t be satisfied with their facilities.
➡️Discrimination among students is there. Council members (captains) will be prioritised the most and their wrong doings will be forgiven right away.
➡️Some juniors don’t respect their seniors and if you complain, no one will do anything.
➡️Bullying/ragging happens a lot here. But no one will do anything if you complain. Specially if a council member bullies someone (which they do), no one will take your complain seriously. Not even the teachers. Once the head girl made a girl serve water to everyone just because she was talking at the dining hall. And everyone was laughing at her and insulting her. All the teachers and even the vice principal were present there. Just because she is a head girl, it doesn’t give her the right to make someone feel so small. She herself talks loudly with her other council minions and the teachers don’t tell her anything just because she’s a head girl.
➡️You won’t find time to study properly. There is prep time (study time) which happens for like 1 hour (but I think they decreased the time period now). During prep time, everyone will talk and you can’t focus on studying at all. I once went to the library to study quietly but I was driven right away. They said, "no one is here. so you can’t stay here alone. " I mean like what the hell? The whole school is guarded. I won’t escape, dude! A lot of girls came to the library and all of them were driven away. So yeah, academic wise this school is zero.
➡️The mess/dining hall is so unhygienic🤮. Cockroaches roam around everywhere and the tables and chairs are so greasy. We complained the teachers and they just smiled. The foods are bad as well. They will cook nicely only when parents or new students come.
➡️At sports, the coaches do favouritism. The hard working players will be ignored and the bad players will be chosen.
➡️In the dorm, stealing happens a lot. Even if you lock your  cupboard, you can easily open the cupboard slightly from underneath and take things. The house mother won’t do anything as well if complained. She will just say, “you should have been more careful.”
➡️While we stay away from our dorm rooms and go outside like at the school or sports, the ayah didis use students’ washrooms and don’t flush. I complained this to my house mother and the ayah didi
refused right away. Also the school’s washrooms are broken and unclean.
I could literally make a never ending list about this terrible school.

itemReviewed.name: ecole globale international girls school - Adhoiwala

itemListElement.reviewBody: Ecole Globale International Girls School is the best choice for my daughter as I had explored other options as well, my daughter has just started school this session and within few months we are happy with positive changes in her and the confidence she is bearing in her personality. The faculty, staff and other members of the school are warm and nice in every way, would definitely suggest all the parents who have daughters to explore this school as their option as well.

The management must consider keeping such people on staff that are involved in immoral and unethical practices.
